root.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no as loan_contract_no_full, SUBSTR(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, 4, 6) as loan_contract_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code) ||''||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, (select member_group_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as member_group_name, (select manager_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as manager_name, SUBSTR((select member_group_control from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no), 1, 3) as member_group_control from sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '083287'
